title: The Stag-Hunt.
content:
The morning is breaking--
        The stag is away!
    The hounds and the hunters
        The signal obey!
    The horn bids the echoes
        Awake as we go,
    And nature is jocund
        With hark!--tally-ho!
                Hark away!
                    Tally-ho!

    Hark forward!--Tantivy!--
        The woodland resounds
    With shouts of the sportsmen
        To cheer on the hounds!
    The horse and his rider,
        The deer and his foe,
    Dash by to the music
        Of hark!--tally-ho!
                (He's at bay!)
                    Tally-ho!
meaning:
George Pope Morris's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "The Stag-Hunt."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
